title: Find Maximum Non Decreasing Array Length
description: Repeatedly replace contiguous subarrays by their sums; return the maximum possible length of a nondecreasing final array. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int]. 1 <= len(nums) <= 100000; nums are positive <=100000; operations may be applied repeatedly.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
